# HER ONE | her.one – HER ONE - Female Health & Wellbeing

Manage consent preferences

[only essential cookies](https://her.one/)[Accept all](https://her.one/)

Here you can allow or exclude tracking and analysis tools on our website.

Strictly necessary cookies

Always allowed

These cookies are essential in order to enable you to move around the website and use its features, such as accessing secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

[Cookies details](javascript:void(0))

*   Name secure_customer_sig Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention 1 days Purpose Used to identify a user after they sign into a shop as a customer so they do not need to log in again.
*   Name cart_currency Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention 1 days Purpose Used after a checkout is completed to initialize a new empty cart with the same currency as the one just used.
*   Name cart Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention 1 days Purpose Contains information related to the user's cart.
*   Name cart_ts Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention 1 days Purpose Used in connection with checkout.
*   Name cart_sig Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention 1 days Purpose A hash of the contents of a cart. This is used to verify the integrity of the cart and to ensure performance of some cart operations.
*   Name shopify_pay_redirect Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 days Purpose Used to accelerate the checkout process when the buyer has a Shop Pay account.
*   Name localization Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to localize the cart to the correct country.
*   Name keep_alive Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used when international domain redirection is enabled to determine if a request is the first one of a session.
*   Name _pandectes_gdpr Provider Pandectes Domain.her.one Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used for the functionality of the cookies consent banner.
*   Name _tracking_consent Provider Shopify Domain.her.one Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to store a user's preferences if a merchant has set up privacy rules in the visitor's region.
*   Name _cmp_a Provider Shopify Domain.her.one Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used for managing customer privacy settings.
*   Name c Provider shopify Domain.bidswitch.net Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Wird im Zusammenhang mit der Kasse verwendet.
*   Name _shopify_essential Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Contains essential information for the correct functionality of a store such as session and checkout information and anti-tampering data.
*   Name receive-cookie-deprecation Provider Shopify Domain.adnxs.com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose A cookie specified by Google to identify certain Chrome browsers affected by the third-party cookie deprecation.
*   Name wpm-test-cookie Provider Shopify Domain one Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session Purpose Used to ensure our systems are working correctly.
*   Name wpm-test-cookie Provider Shopify Domain her.one Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention Session Purpose Used to ensure our systems are working correctly.

Functional cookies

- [x]  

These cookies enable the site to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
